.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Bump the embedded Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 0.5.6.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove the 'throws Exception' declaration from the configure method as it is no longer required by the method signature in the updated Spring Security version.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.human_impl: Changed 'public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception' to 'public void configure(WebSecurity web)'

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.1.7.RELEASE to 2.5.5 to align with Java 17 compatibility requirements.
Update the project's target Java version property from 11 to 17.
Upgrade QueryDSL library version from 4.2.1 to 4.3.1.
Add the Spring Boot starter for validation to enable Bean Validation support.
Upgrade the MySQL Connector/J dependency version from 8.0.17 to 8.0.26.
Upgrade the ZXing Java SE library version from 3.4.0 to 3.4.1.
Upgrade the Liquibase Maven plugin version from 3.5.3 to 3.8.7.
Upgrade the Liquibase Hibernate 5 extension version from 3.6 to 3.10.0.
Upgrade Hibernate Validator version from 6.0.13.Final to 7.0.1.Final to support Jakarta EE / Java 17.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the STS4 cache directory to .gitignore to prevent IDE artifacts from being tracked.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven distribution URL to version 3.8.1 to align with newer build tooling standards.
Update the Maven Wrapper JAR to version 0.5.6 to ensure compatibility and security.

README.md.general_idea: Remove the section containing online demo URL and login credentials from the README.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted lines containing 'Online Demo: https://demo.rasc.ch/eds-starter6/' and the associated login table.

mvnw.general_idea: Changed the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Updated the script header comment to remove the outdated 'Maven2' terminology.
mvnw.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.general_idea: Fixed a whitespace issue in a comment URL pointing to Apple developer documentation.
Bumped the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 0.5.6.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Modernize the script header description to remove the outdated 'Maven2' terminology.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Correct a minor typo in the environment variable documentation comment.
Bump the Maven Wrapper JAR version to a newer release.
